title: Machine Learning Basics
description: Understand how computers learn on their own

scenes.speech: What does machine learning mean? Let's discover it together!
scenes.title: Machine Learning Basics

scenes.speech: Machine learning is the core of AI!
scenes.title: What is Machine Learning?
scenes.content: Machine learning is technology that lets computers automatically find patterns in data. Programmers no longer need to write every rule!

scenes.speech: Teach it by showing the right answers!
scenes.title: Supervised Learning
scenes.content: You label data as 'cat' or 'dog' and let the AI learn from examples. It's like studying with an answer key!
scenes.highlight: Example: ✉️ Spam detection 🏠 Home price prediction

scenes.speech: Finding patterns without being told the answers!
scenes.title: Unsupervised Learning
scenes.content: Without labels, AI finds its own groups and patterns. Great for customer segmentation and anomaly detection!

scenes.speech: Learning through trial and error like a game!
scenes.title: Reinforcement Learning
scenes.content: Reward for success, penalty for failure. This is how AI beat world champions at Go and chess!

scenes.speech: Too much memorizing can be a problem!
scenes.title: Overfitting vs Generalization
scenes.content: When AI memorizes training data too well, it fails on new data. This is 'overfitting'. Balance is key!

scenes.speech: What you show AI matters enormously!
scenes.title: Feature Engineering
scenes.content: Which 'features' of data you train the AI on determines accuracy. Choosing good features is a human job!
scenes.highlight: 🎯 Good data + Good features = Smart AI

scenes.speech: How do you measure how smart an AI is?
scenes.title: Evaluating Models
scenes.content: Accuracy, precision, recall, F1-score — these measure AI performance. Like a grade on a test!

scenes.title: Machine Learning Applications
scenes.content: Medical diagnosis, financial prediction, automatic translation, image recognition... ML is revolutionizing every industry!

scenes.speech: You're starting to understand machine learning! Keep it up!
scenes.title: Lesson Complete!
